issues.detail: The skill assumes a Node.js environment with TypeScript support, which may not be available in all AI agents.

scenarios.name: Create Unkey key for customer-42 with rate limit, expiry, and roles
scenarios.rationale: Baseline guesses generic key-management code without Unkey SDK shape, missing apiId/ownerId/meta/ratelimit{type:'fast',limit,duration}/expires/roles; treatment uses unkey.keys.create with the exact documented options.

scenarios.name: Auth middleware with verifyKey and 429/403 handling
scenarios.rationale: Baseline does not know the verifyKey export or the code strings (RATE_LIMITED, NOT_FOUND, etc.); treatment imports verifyKey from @unkey/api, branches on result.code === 'RATE_LIMITED' for 429, and gates roles for 403.
